stories.headline: Disneyland's Tiana's Bayou Adventure Suffers Second Child Ride Incident - TMZ
stories.summary: Another child allegedly got out of a log on Disneyland's Tiana's Bayou Adventure over the weekend, marking the second reported incident on the waterfall ride in about a month ... TMZ has learned.
stories.why: Safety failures at major family attractions signal whether corporations are cutting corners on rides your kids will actually go on—two incidents in a month suggests systemic negligence, not flukes.

stories.headline: Simone Biles sets record straight about Swift, Kelce wedding invite - USA Today
stories.summary: Social media users questioned Simone Biles' attendance at Taylor Swift's wedding, prompting the Olympian to respond. Here's what she said.
stories.why: Elite athletes publicly correcting their social media narrative reveals how carefully curated celebrity friendships actually are, and why the Swift-Kelce wedding became a cultural referendum on who matters.

stories.headline: ‘Survivor’ star Rick Devens to compete on ‘Big Brother’ season 28 (exclusive) - Entertainment Weekly
stories.summary: Rick Devens is one of two ‘Survivor’ stars who will be competing on ‘Big Brother’ season 28, Entertainment Weekly has learned. Check out all the details.
stories.why: Reality TV is cannibalizing itself by recycling 'Survivor' veterans into 'Big Brother'—it's a sign the genre has run out of new ideas and is living off nostalgia rather than novelty.

stories.headline: David Lowery Tackling Adaptation of Horror Novel ‘The Fisherman’ for Focus (Exclusive) - The Hollywood Reporter
stories.summary: Michael Bay's Platinum Dunes and Gary Dauberman's Coin Operated have teamed up for the adaptation of the Bram Stoker Award winner.
stories.why: David Lowery directing a serious horror adaptation signals prestige filmmaking is finally moving beyond superhero IP, but Focus's involvement means it'll probably get compromise-gutted for mainstream appeal anyway.

stories.headline: Brad Pitt Finally Makes Instagram Debut With Ines de Ramon—Months After Happy Couple Moved In Together - Yahoo
stories.summary: Pitt, 62, and de Ramon, 33, who have been dating for nearly four years, posed in photos ahead of Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding.
stories.why: A 62-year-old A-lister's Instagram debut with a 33-year-old girlfriend *at* another couple's wedding is a masterclass in controlling narrative—he's not just dating younger, he's publicly reframing his entire brand around it.

stories.headline: Dwayne Johnson to Star in 'Free Byrd' From Artists Equity, Greg Kwedar - Variety
stories.summary: Dwayne Johnson will star in "Free Byrd," about a motorcycle stuntman with dementia, from Ben Affleck and Matt Damon's Artists Equity and Greg Kwedar.
stories.why: The Rock pivoting to character-driven indie drama about dementia through Affleck-Damon's production company signals even megastars now need prestige credibility, not just box office domination.

stories.headline: Mariska Hargitay to Host Emmys; First Woman to Emcee the Show In 15 Years - Variety
stories.summary: Mariska Hargitay will host the 78th Emmys, which airs live Monday, Sept. 14 on NBC and Peacock. She's the first woman to emcee the show in 15 years.
stories.why: A woman hosting the Emmys after 15 years of male hosts matters less than *why* it took this long in an industry women dominate—it exposes how awards shows still treat hosting as a male gatekeeping role.

stories.headline: Travis Kelce's Ex Kayla Nicole Spotted For First Time Since Taylor Swift Wedding - TMZ
stories.summary: Kayla Nicole's not sitting at home and pining for her ex Travis Kelce after his wedding to Taylor Swift ... she's out living her life ... and showing off her gym bod to boot.
stories.why: The media obsessing over Kelce's ex 'moving on' reveals how badly we want second-act validation stories, but also how disposable women become once they're no longer attached to fame.
